commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=9885bf241d6b4d2ea87ae46ef96a5dd6ef1fe23c)
commands.review_summary:
The PR widens auto-reply restart/drain terminal handling to return the silent token when either per-session restart recovery is armed or the process-global gateway-draining flag is set, with focused regression tests.

PR surface: Source +19, Tests +154. Total +173 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level, but not as a live run. Current main runs preflight before durable restart delivery context persistence, and the PR's added test constructs the global-drain/no-armed-context state that becomes silent.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor or maintainer follow-up is required because the branch has a blocking message-delivery finding and external real-behavior proof is missing.

target.title: fix(auto-reply): silence restart terminals while gateway globally draining
target.body:
## Summary

- Keep restart-drain terminal replies silent when restart recovery is active through either the per-session arm flag or the process-global gateway draining flag.
- Preserve the existing visible restart notice for genuinely unarmed, non-draining failures.
- Add regressions for fallback-wrapped `GatewayDrainingError` / `CommandLaneClearedError` and the preflight drain path.

## Root cause

The previous guard only checked whether the current run had persisted its restart-recovery delivery context. In the observed restart race, recovery can mark the session before this run persists that context, so the per-run arm flag is false while the gateway is already globally draining. A fallback-wrapped drain error then leaked the visible `Gateway is restarting` terminal reply, making the original owed turn look complete and forcing a manual retry.

## Validation

Clean branch based on live `origin/main`:

- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=2 pnpm test src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.test.ts` → 219 passed
- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=2 pnpm test src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner.misc.runreplyagent.test.ts` → 49 passed
- `pnpm tsgo:core` → passed
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner.misc.runreplyagent.test.ts` → passed

Known unrelated local checks:

- Repo-wide `pnpm format:check` is red on pre-existing unrelated files.
- `pnpm check:changed` could not run locally because the Blacksmith/crabbox wrapper failed its basic sanity check.
